titleStmt.title: SII 11.158: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 158. (B.K. No. 66 of 1926-27.) YALI-SIRŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB BUILT INTO A WALL OF THE BHŌGĒŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This inscription refers itself to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 34, Virōdhi, Āśvayuja, ba. 5, Thursday, corresponding to A.D. 1109, September 16, Thursday; the month was Adhika-Āśvayuja. It registers grants of land, gold and toll incomes, made by Eight Gāvuṇḍas, the Sixty Families, the Five-Hundred Nakara and other guilds such as Dōṇi One-Thousand, Ugura Three-Hundred, etc., to the temple of Bhōgēśvara of Eleya-Śrīpura. Another gift made to the same temple by Mahāpradhāna Sāyipayya and the Mahāprahāna, Karaṇada Nāgavarmayya is also recorded. A third gift is stated to have been made by certain Seṭṭis to the gods Bhōgēśvara and Amṛitēśvara and the goddess Sarasvatīdēvī. Bhūtarasa and Malidēvarasa of the Baisa-kula and residents of Toṟagale are also stated to have made a gift of certain income to god Bhōgēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© namastuṁgasiraścuṁbhitacaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkhyanagarāraṁbhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē ©
© svasti samastabhuvanāsraya śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyā
srayekuḻatiḻakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhipra
varddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbara saluttamire ©
svasti samastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkritasarīra rēkāṁgavīraru nuḍida(ṁ)ntegaṇḍaru dhuradaḷoḷgaṁḍaruṁ saraṇāgatavajra
paṁjararuṁ vairimadabhaṁjanaruṁ bhōgapuraṁdararu tyāgavidyādhararuṁ sujanaprasa(ṁ)nnaruṁ nuḍidumatte
nnaruṁ gōtrapavitraruṁ Āsritajanakalpavrikṣaruṁ śrībhōgēsvaradēvapādārādhakaru mappa Eleyaśrīpurada ka
ḍaṁbara kārigāvuṇḍanuṁ taṁbara sāvimagāvuṇḍanuṁ dhavaḷada kētagāvuṇḍanuṁ hulugala sindagāvuṇḍanu yi
ntinibaru mukhyamāgi Eṁṭu gāvuṇḍu maṟuvatokkalu nakarasamūhamirddu śrīmaccāḷukyavikra
makālada 34 neyavirōdhisaṁ vatsarada Āsvayuja bahuḷa 5 brihaspativāradaṁdu śrībhō
gēsvaradēvargge biṭṭa tōṁṭa māvudeṁdaḍe Ūriṁda mūḍa dēvariṁge teṁka hulugala Āycagāvuṁḍa biṭṭa tōṁ
ṭa monduma sarvvābādhaparihāramāgi biṭṭaru . svasti samastaguṇagaṇāḷaṁkrita cārucāri
tra nayavinayavinūna vīrabaḷaṁjadharmmapratipāḷanaguḍḍadhvajavirājitamānōnnataruṁ khaṇḍaḷimūḷa
bhadrōdbhavaruṁ bhalluṁkedaṇḍahastaru saraṇāgatavajrapaṁjarar vairibhēruṇḍaruṁ
paṁcasatagotrānvayaruma ppainūrvvaru nakaramu mirddu biṭṭa dharmma māvudeṁdaḍe sā
rige yokkalalu bhatta koḷaga 1 Eḷḷu Uppu gōduve baḷḷa 2 Aṁgaḍiyokkalalu paṇa 1 salage soṁṭige Ā
kkida saṁcakāra Intinituma dēvargge biṭṭaru . © . svasti samastaguṇasampaṁna rappa Aṟuvattokkalu mirddu biṭṭa dha
rmma māvudeṁdaḍe mēṁṭiyalu paṇa 1 tōṁṭadalu paṇa 1 © matta dōṇisāsirvsara nagartteyenteṁdaḍe . nuḍiyi
suvudarigu nuḍidaḍe mriḍana bara rāma rēsu karṇnana vacanaṁ kaḍeda siḷāsāsanamene nuḍidēvaṇnisuve drōṇi
sāsirvvaruma . matta dōṇisāsirvvara biṭṭa dharmma māudeṁdaḍe dōṇiya loṁdu paṇava nācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ
biṭṭaru . matta jalagina teṟeyarasu biṭṭa dharmma māvudaṁdaḍe 1 dōṇiya baniyuṁ teṟeyumaṁ sarvabādhapa
rihāramāgi biṭṭaru . mattaṁ Ugura mūnūrvvara negartte yenteṁdaḍe . siḍila neḍegali pa rēḻuṁ kaḍalaṁ dāṁṭalke
bagevaraṁjade naṁjaṁ kuḍiya loḍarisuva raḷkade piḍivaru phaṇipatiya nanipa rugura beḍaṁgaru . Intenisi
dugura mūnūrvvaru Ēṇiyalondu paṇava nācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbara biṭṭar . perjjuṁ kada perggaḍe karaṇaṁgaḷ
biṭṭa dharmmamāvudeṁdaḍe kuḷiya suṁka dākāraṇeyiṁ biṭṭa tōṁṭa 1 . taṁbuligaseṭṭigaḷu biṭṭa dharmmamāvu
deṁdaḍe hēṟeṁge vīsa 1 ma nācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ biṭṭaru . dēvara gāṇakketeṟe baṇnige ḍoṁki bīravaṇa sarvva
bādhaparihāramāgi biṭṭaru . svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyaka sā
yipayyaṁgaḷuṁ mahāpradhānaṁ karaṇada nāgavarmmayyanāyakaru śrībhōgēsvara dēvargge biṭṭa dharmma māvudeṁdaḍe
Ūriṁ paḍuva Elevaḷḷadiṁ mūḍa kaḍaṁbara taṁbara polada sīmeyalu kārigāmuṁḍa biṭṭa mattaru 9 sāvimagāvuṁḍa biṭṭa ma
tta 3 Aṁtu matta 12 kkaṁ sarvvabādhaparihāramāgi biṭṭaru . svasti samastaguṇa gaṇāḷamkrita satyaśaucācāracārucāri
tranayavineyaguṇaśīḷasaṁpannaru nuḍidumattennaruṁ gōtrapavitraruṁ sujanaika mitraruṁ Āśritajanakalpavri
kṣaruṁ māhēsvarasameyasamuddharaṇaruṁ śrībhōgēsvaradēvaruṁ Amritēsvaradēvapādārādhakarumappa Ā
mmaṇiyaranākiseṭṭiya cāvuṇḍikabbeya suputrakoladīpakarumappa mahāvaḍḍa bevahāri cāvuṇḍiseṭṭiyaru
ṭṭiseṭṭiyaru māciseṭṭiyaruṁ Intivara dharmmamāphudeṁdaḍe Amritēsvara dēgulamaṁ kaḷasanirvāṇaṁ mā
ḍi maṭamaṁ māḍi sarasvatīdēviyaṁ pratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍi tamma muttayyaṁ hulugala yāycagāvuṇḍa bi
ṭṭa tōṭa palakāla bīḷāgiralu Ā bhūmi neṟeyadirḻdaḍe cāvuṇḍiseṭṭiyaru kārigāvuṇḍana kayyoḷu ma
ttaṁ bhōgabhūmiyaṁ ponnaṁ koṭṭu māṟako(ṁ)ṇḍu Ā tōṭamaṁ māḍisi Ali puṭṭida dravyamaṁ śrībhōgēsvara
dēvara Amritēsvaradēvara sarasvatīdēviyara Aṁgabhōganivēdyakke biṭṭaru . Ōṁ namaḥ sivāya
dēvadōṭamaṁ māḍuva tōṁṭiga dēvarigikkuva maryyāde Emte(ṁ)ndaḍe nūṟu marakke mūṟu gadyā
ṇa pūnna Eṇikeyiṁ tettu sokavipparu . I maryyādeyaṁ Illiya yācāryya sōmēsvarapaṁḍitaru
kādu naḍeyisuvaru . I dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavaru vāraṇāsi gurukṣētraṁ gaṁge gaṁgāsāgaraṁ
śrīparvvatameṁba tīrttastānaṁgaḷoḷ sāsirakavileyaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratna doḷu kaṭṭisi mahāritvija
rggubhayamukṣigoṭṭa puṇyada phala makku . Intī dharmmama nida nāvanorvva naḷidaṁge vāraṇāsiyoḷu kavi
leyuṁ brāhmaṇarumaṁ tapōdhanaruma naḷida pātakanakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁ
dhara ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyā jāyatē krimi . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmasētu nripāṇāṁ
kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhi sarvvānnētā bhāginaṟpārtthivēndrā bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rā
mabhadra . baisakuḷakamaḷamārtthaṇḍaru baisakuḷānvayarappa toṟagaleya
bhūtarasaruṁ mallidēvarasarumirdu biṭṭa dharmmamāvudeṁdaḍe Eleyaśrīpura
da śrībhōgēsvaradēvara Aṁgabhōgakke dēvara tōṭada pannāyamaṁ sarvvābādha
parihāramāgi biṭṭaru Adaṁ tamma dharmmamāgi kaiheyamanāyakanuṁ si
yamaseṭṭiyaruṁ Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ pratipāḷisuvaru ©
Digital edition of SII 11.158 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
